cases.prompt: Set up a zero-downtime Laravel deployment on a traditional server with rollback
cases.expect: references symlink releases + shared storage/.env + rollback script from references/zero-downtime-and-env.md

cases.prompt: Deploy my Laravel app with Docker and docker-compose in production
cases.expect: references multi-stage Dockerfile + nginx/supervisor + compose from references/docker.md

cases.prompt: Configure Laravel Vapor for staging and production
cases.expect: references vapor.yml environments + vapor deploy commands from references/forge-and-vapor.md
